summary: Iteration 2 frontend-only verification completed. All homepage repositioning changes (hero copy, proof bar credentials, TPA broader copy, Baseline new title with size='md', Founder section with placeholder image + role line + 'Read founder profile' CTA, coaching placeholder, 10-item credentials list on Home and /about, /about placeholder image, EN/TR toggle with Turkish hero & proof, no fake stats/testimonials/newsletter) verified successfully. All other pages render without console errors.
critical_code_review_comments:
Minor: hero-title innerText concatenates 'TennisPerformance.Measured.' because
doesn't introduce spaces in text_content. Visually fine (each line is a span/wrap), but if any automated test ever needs space-separated words, consider splitting words across spans with whitespace. Non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 fully passes. Site uses external URL https://tennis-data-hub-1.preview.emergentagent.com. EN/TR toggle persists via localStorage key 'tpa-lang'. Founder image uses PlaceholderBlock components (data-testid placeholder-founder on Home, placeholder-founder-about on /about, placeholder-coaching on Coaching section). /about page has zero tags inside [data-testid=page-about].
